top_findings.summary: The skill description in HOW_TO_USE.md requests "Design Problem," "Context (user research findings, brand guidelines)," and promises "Design Deliverables (wireframes, mockups, prototypes)," which are unrelated to the stated primary purpose of marketing demand acquisition, paid media optimization, SEO strategy, and partnership programs. This constitutes excessive data collection for a skill focused on marketing analytics and strategy.
